mano_cua.result_summary: 无法完整测试日期范围排序问题。'Modes & formats'页面（displayFormat设置所在页面）返回500 Internal Error，'Working with dates'页面同样返回500错误。在首页的 Date range picker 中成功选择了 8月31日到9月1日的范围，日历确认选择后右侧日历跳转到10月（异常行为），但无法验证自定义 displayFormat='j. n. Y' 格式下的日期排序，因为格式设置页面全部崩溃。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Multiple documentation pages return 500 Internal Error including 'Modes & formats' and 'Working with dates'. The date range picker on the introduction page was tested - Aug 31 to Sep 1 was selected - but custom displayFormat could not be applied since the formatting page is broken. The right calendar unexpectedly jumped from September to October after confirming the range selection.
